name: Mushroom-Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water until al dente, then drain.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet. Saute the onion for a couple of minutes, then add the mushrooms and thyme. Cook for a few minutes more.
3. Place tofu cottage cheese, egg replacer, and shoyu or tamari in a blender or food processor. Blend until smooth and creamy.
4. Mix together cooked and drained pasta, sauteed vegetables, tofu mixture, and peas. Transfer to an oiled baking dish. Top with bread crumbs and drizzle with oil.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Serve with steamed vegetable and raw salad.
